query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS siem_integrations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  siem_tenant_id INT,
  siem_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  siem_provider ENUM('splunk','elastic','sentinel','qradar','custom') NOT NULL,
  siem_base_url VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  siem_api_key_enc TEXT,
  siem_query_template TEXT,
  siem_is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  siem_last_tested TIMESTAMP NULL,
  siem_created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS detection_feedback_results (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  dfr_tenant_id INT,
  dfr_siem_id INT NOT NULL,
  dfr_technique_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  dfr_technique_name VARCHAR(255),
  dfr_campaign_id INT,
  dfr_executed_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  dfr_query_window_sec INT DEFAULT 300 NOT NULL,
  dfr_alerts_found INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  dfr_result ENUM('detected','missed','partial','error') NOT NULL,
  dfr_alert_details JSON,
  dfr_query_used TEXT,
  dfr_latency_ms INT,
  dfr_created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenants (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  tenant_slug VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  tenant_logo_url VARCHAR(512),
  tenant_primary_color VARCHAR(16),
  tenant_is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  tenant_max_users INT DEFAULT 50 NOT NULL,
  tenant_plan ENUM('free','pro','enterprise') DEFAULT 'free' NOT NULL,
  tenant_created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  tenant_updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenant_memberships (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tm_tenant_id INT NOT NULL,
  tm_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  tm_role ENUM('owner','admin','operator','viewer') DEFAULT 'viewer' NOT NULL,
  tm_joined_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vuln_scan_imports (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vsi_tenant_id INT,
  vsi_scanner_type ENUM('nessus','qualys','rapid7','openvas','custom') NOT NULL,
  vsi_file_name VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  vsi_imported_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  vsi_total_hosts INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  vsi_total_vulns INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  vsi_critical INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  vsi_high INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  vsi_medium INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  vsi_low INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  vsi_imported_by VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vuln_scan_findings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vsf_import_id INT NOT NULL,
  vsf_tenant_id INT,
  vsf_cve_id VARCHAR(32),
  vsf_title VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  vsf_severity ENUM('critical','high','medium','low','info') NOT NULL,
  vsf_cvss_score DOUBLE,
  vsf_host_ip VARCHAR(45),
  vsf_host_name VARCHAR(255),
  vsf_port INT,
  vsf_protocol VARCHAR(16),
  vsf_description TEXT,
  vsf_solution TEXT,
  vsf_plugin_id VARCHAR(64),
  vsf_exploit_available BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  vsf_attack_path_linked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  vsf_created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS risk_trend_snapshots (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  rts_tenant_id INT,
  rts_snapshot_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  rts_overall_score DOUBLE NOT NULL,
  rts_detection_coverage DOUBLE,
  rts_prevention_coverage DOUBLE,
  rts_critical_vulns INT DEFAULT 0,
  rts_open_findings INT DEFAULT 0,
  rts_mttd_ms INT,
  rts_mttr_ms INT,
  rts_tactic_scores JSON,
  rts_source VARCHAR(64),
  rts_created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
